level_1772718364411_erw9i6bmq.name: The Gods: Cat Melon's Revenge
level_1772718364411_erw9i6bmq.startTip:
Woah, this Squash Melon squad is absolutely stacked with talent, huh?
The chill Squash Melon, the pay-to-win Squash Melon, the charming Squash Melon
The hard Squash Melon, the volatile Squash Melon, the hot Squash Melon - this is PG material!
And there's even a Squash Melon that shows up and <U><color=#B8860B><SIZE=20>wipes the whole floor</SIZE></color>!</U>
Plus their very own <U><SIZE=20><color=#F08080>"Princess" Cat Melon</SIZE></color>!</U>

level_1772722911574_8n760typj.name: Alpha Snipe Striker
level_1772722911574_8n760typj.startTip:
Alpha Snipe Striker!
(Yeah the original blurb writer did not try very hard)

level_1772794811952_9hc854i7q.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Anti-air Berserker
level_1772794811952_9hc854i7q.startTip: As absolutely nobody knows, Death God Snipe Strike Shooter can "hit" air units too. While targeting other zombies, the projectile also casually clips anything flying by. Give it a go and knock those flyers out of the sky! N.B.: if any plant dies, it'll result in a game over!

level_1772872400910_vnoc3otz4.name: Super Nutsweeper
level_1772872400910_vnoc3otz4.startTip:
<SIZE=26><color=white>
<align=left><U>Ground Spike Tough Fruit - 0</U>
<U>Foreign Peach Tough Fruit - 1</U>
<U>Roll Heart Vegetable Tough Fruit - 2</U>
<U>Cherry Peach Tough Fruit - 3</U>
<U>Fire Flame Tough Fruit - 4</U>
<U>Cold Ice Tough Fruit - 5</U>
<U>Silver Tough Fruit - 6</U>
	<U>Charm Confuse Tough Fruit - 7</U>
	<U>Destroy Eradicate Tough Fruit - 8</U>
<align=center></color><U>Each Nut type shows the number of mines around it
Use Extreme Cold Ice Beans to mark mine spots - there are 58 in total, good luck!










</U>

level_1773140970286_7bsqxg8pe.name: Refactoring
level_1773140970286_7bsqxg8pe.startTip:
<size=24><align=left><color=white>Base rules:
<size=18>Odyssey fusions: Disabled
Glove CD: 0s
Wave Interval: 40s
Natural Sun drop: Disabled
Rigid Corpse Sun drop: Enabled
Fusion Disassembly: Enabled

<size=144>
<align=center><size=15></color>Difficulty 0-5 all ok. The panel on the left lists every gameplay tweak for this level.
The first 8 plants in your slots can each only be bought once, while the remaining 5 can be purchased infinitely (with a short cooldown).
Use disassembly and recombine plants into more valuable forms: if you play it right, you can even create some base plants.
Note: Plant stats are completely unchanged
<size=300>

level_1773141401946_ajdjyjtmr.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Hypnosis
level_1773141401946_ajdjyjtmr.startTip:
<size=24><align=left>Base rules:
<size=18>Rigid Corpse damage: 2×
Odyssey fusions: Disabled
<size=242>
<align=center><size=18>Pure Puzzler, Recommended difficulties: 0-3 (otherwise may not be solvable)
The panel on the left lists every gameplay tweak for this level, please read them before you play.
Challenge: Clear the level without using the Charm Confuse Mushroom in your seed slot.
<size=300>

level_1774021232832_2o5a8h8md.name: Odyssey Gacha: Purgatory of Diamond
level_1774021232832_2o5a8h8md.startTip:
You should accept the whims of fate
Once you've set foot on this path
-------------
Recommended difficulties: 0-4
Mini-bosses are recommended to be disabled
Challenge: Clear the level with the 3 settings pertaining to Gacha modes all enabled

level_1774109191871_tfirdlefk.name: The Gods: Through Time and Space

level_1774119630318_rld1qhxlg.name: Undead Eternal
level_1774119630318_rld1qhxlg.startTip:
You can see all balance changes in this level through the Editor or using H on plants.
The Mallet is banned.
Rigid Corpses in this level have reduced HP but higher damage and increased number.

            Click on                 Good luck                    to start

level_1774164065908_1y752bodf.name: I, Rigid Corpse: Welcome to the Darkside
level_1774164065908_1y752bodf.startTip:
A very generic I, Rigid Corpse level.
As you can see, you need to act fast and kill the Road Lantern Flower at the start.
Recommended difficulties: 4-5 (otherwise not solvable)
Submitter: 窝是fvv, Best Solution: 375 Sun left

level_1774174308190_dakkzec42.name: Blank Level (Edit this to reset Level Editor settings)

level_1774316229611_6nctetuy8.name: Grave Tripper
level_1774316229611_6nctetuy8.startTip:
Trip Hold Pole Rigid Corpses up with Grave Tomb Swallow Consumers. Try to save your Grave Tomb Swallow Consumers.
The Undying Totem Modifier is activated for this level.Challenge: Clear the level without using the Undying Totem.

level_1774355110855_hcqameykh.name: The Gods: Trial of Synergies
level_1774355110855_hcqameykh.startTip: Submitter: 怪猫_SC(Bilibili) Cherrybomber & Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit McCornics Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon

level_1774355113900_swfar1lf9.name: Land Grabber
level_1774355113900_swfar1lf9.startTip: The Glove in this level has reduced CD, use it well! [High difficulty warning: try with caution] Cherish every piece of land you have! Protect your Flower Pots! Tip: Metal zombies too beefy to make a dent in? Maybe you need some Magnetic power.

level_1774406542551_2cbqzyxbk.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Meltdown
level_1774406542551_2cbqzyxbk.startTip:
<size=24><align=left>Base rules:
<size=18>Rigid Corpse damage: 2×
Rigid Corpse speed: 0.8×
Odyssey fusions: Disabled
<size=18>High Gravity: Enabled
<size=24>Modifiers:
<size=18>Craterless Doom explosions
Rigid Corpses have a 0.1s i-frame each hit

<size=120>
<align=center><size=18>Pure Puzzler, Recommended difficulties: 0-3 (otherwise may not be solvable)

The panel on the left lists every gameplay tweak for this level, please read them before you play.
Challenge: Clear the level without using the Destroy Eradicate Cherry Peach in your seed slot.
<size=300>

level_1774599144997_0qpxg22jh.name: The Gods: Back to Basics
level_1774599144997_0qpxg22jh.startTip:
<color=red>What is this level? Are we de-evolving?</color>
*<color=yellow>Fascinating. Anyways, watch out for flying zombies and the Mallet recharges super fast in this level.</color>
<color=green>Support plants: Midas/G.M.Nut/Tall Tough Fruits/Ultra Extreme Ice God Destroy Eradicate Mushroom</color>

level_1774599184523_5jzbx956k.name: Death from Above
level_1774599184523_5jzbx956k.startTip:
You will face the coordinated attacks of flying zombies and bungees.
<color=#FF0000>When it is time for end game, the winner descends from above!</color>

level_1774600503668_1dle8ve5z.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Follow the Cone
level_1774600503668_1dle8ve5z.startTip: The Conehead isn't making any friends with the Little Devil Rigid Corpses after this one...

level_1774600505253_39nuh24z7.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Master Strategist
level_1774600505253_39nuh24z7.startTip:
High difficulty warning!

Some zombies can be used against others.
Try to obtain metal objects and fuse them with certain plants.
Their control abilities will help you deal with troublesome zombies more effectively.
Recommended difficulty: D3

level_1774600506836_lz1dqhcyv.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Cherrypicking
level_1774600506836_lz1dqhcyv.startTip:
Any difficulty is ok for this level.
              
Try to make as many explosive cherries as possible to wipe out every zombie!

level_1774611032370_90xngigri.name: Stopwatch
level_1774611032370_90xngigri.startTip:
This level is based on D5 and is pretty tough: choose your difficulty wisely! (Spawns are fixed; only damage reduction can be adjusted).
One full sway up and down of a South Melon is roughly equal to 2 seconds.
Glove cooldown is increased to 25s, and you can only plant down a Flower Pot once!
For the "true experience," try not using the H key to check 3 Leaf South Melon's production CD
If you want an extra challenge, beat the level only using Destroy Eradicate Mushrooms from your seed slots.

level_1774627145655_lu7rlfvtm.name: Third Time's the Charm
level_1774627145655_lu7rlfvtm.startTip:
The Glove has no CD in this level, plants recharge faster and you can disassemble fusions.
Make good use of Little Spray Mushroom stacking and disassembling quirks.
From Three, All Things.

level_1774628038557_3pvkpu1ls.name: Vasebreaker: Snow Burial
level_1774628038557_3pvkpu1ls.startTip:
Squash Melon Ground Spikes can slow down Snow Beast Rigid Corpses effectively.
Coldsnap Beam enables Cold Ice Shooters to Deep Chill cold-resistant zombies.
There are 2 Snow Beast Kings among the Vases, watch out for them!

level_1774710505815_jh5iw4yiw.name: I, Rigid Corpse: Carpet Bombing
level_1774710505815_jh5iw4yiw.startTip:
<size=18>Destroy Eradicate Mushroom erases all other plants in the same tile, and can be fused to make fusions that do the same thing.
Recommended difficulty: 0, Submitter: 小董玩的好, Best Solution: 500 Sun left

level_1774710991748_nlx90py2s.name: Solitary Sword
level_1774710991748_nlx90py2s.startTip:
Click on the seed slot to upgrade
There's little room for error at the start, be ready to sacrifice units if needed.

level_1774801162568_qibeat3la.name: Acrobatics
level_1774801162568_qibeat3la.startTip:
Designed for Difficulty 5, but feel free to play according to your experience.
Ball juggling is a basic skill in acrobatics.
Insiders judge whether an acrobat is well-trained simply by examining their juggling skills.
This level tests your on that.
It's fine if you lose your balls, you have one backup for each of them.
But an expert acrobat does not require off-stage assistance! (Like Mallet, Fire Red Lily, but naturally spawned Fertilizer is ok)
(This level requires heavy micro-management, be prepared to constantly play under slow-mode! But don't worry, the performance won't be long)
